calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-31-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Prove Up Hearing For Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-15-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings not reported.

Howard Olsen, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Emiliomiti, LLC,
No appearance by defaulted defendant JAS FORWARDING (USA) INC.,
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
Witness: Emilio Mitidieri sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $7,104.60
Pre-Judgment Interest: $296.82
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $275.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $7679.42

Judgment signed in open court.
